justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "the Tuesday of next week at 15h" as June 9th at 3 PM and then "Wednesday or Thursday of next week instead" as June 10th or 11th at 3 PM.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully found an alternative slot on Thursday after the initial request for Tuesday was unavailable, proposing a close alternative without further prompting.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just three turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear and helpful responses throughout the conversation.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent seamlessly recovered from the initial unavailability, maintaining full context and offering a suitable alternative without any loss of information.
